channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bin overflowing, 1st April
item.description:
Bin overflowing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marlow Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Couch dumped on pavement, 1st April
item.description:
Couch dumped on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Brook Drive, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping on Annesley Road, 1st April
item.description:
Fly-tipping on Annesley road, two locations. One lot, adjacent to skip is general waste. Second location, on grass about 30-40 metres away, garden waste.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Annesley Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking bay-line painting faded, 1st April
item.description:
Several parking boxes faded. Becomes impossible to park within a box when most of the box lines have faded with eroded roads too. It’s been reported before but nothing has been done. We pay road tax, council tax and for permits but we can’t even park on a road where we live simply because there isn’t enough space or the box isn’t clear at all. Please sort this.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grove Road, North Finchley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several pot holes, 1st April
item.description:
Several pot holes near residential car park spaces. People often drive away to avoid damaging their car because of the several pot holes but also risks parked cars too.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grove Road, North Finchley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ton bag left in the road opposite 4 Esmeralda Road, 1st April
item.description:
It is just bits and pieces in a ton bag but there was a similar amount of waste left here several weeks ago.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Esmeralda Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household rubbish dumped, 1st April
item.description:
Large pile of household rubbish dumped inc highchair

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Windus Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge pile of wooden crates dumped, 1st April
item.description:
Huge pile of wooden crates, a pallet and other rubbish dumped next to container by shop. Looks like commercial flytip

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oldhill Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flower beds need weeding, 1st April
item.description:
Please weeds the beds outside the dentist. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 56, Cotmandene Crescent, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed vehicle, 1st April
item.description:
The vehiclrvis untaxed and has been abandoned. Youngsters keep opening doors on car. We know who has left it here and is now disused as they are using a new vehicle. Window has been left open. Been here for over 2 months

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bideford Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Fox- Report 2!, 1st April
item.description:
I reported on Sunday- been marked as fixed however fox is still there!! 9203408 Dead fox in front of black garages on the corner of Sewell Road/Church Mannor Way! Next to the bus stop. Nearest houses are 162/161 however cannot be seen from the house you need to go to the black garages! Fox is decaying and lots of children use the local bus stop it is not a nice sight Please can this be removed.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sewell Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: One fridge and one sofa 25meters aparts, 1st April
item.description:
One fridge and one sofa left in the sidewalk just 25 meters apartsz been there since start of the week.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sturdy Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Non signage on flats, 1st April
item.description:
1 out of 4 block flats in Alderwood Road & Anstridge Road all flats are connected to Wayfield Link Without signage on buildings is resulting in missed deliveries Plus entrance doors are behind fencing 2 entrances are behind wooden enclosed fencing

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alderwood Road, Avery Hill
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 1st April
item.description:
Graffiti with Ospringe Court Third Block from Alderwood Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alderwood Road, Avery Hill
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Filthy littered street, 1st April
item.description:
Combermere rd covered in litter. It’s like this everyday. Inadequate cleaning schedule. Reported almost daily for months and still in terrible state

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 140, Stockwell Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: X2 trees are bent and need supporting, 1st April
item.description:
X 2 trees in Perpins Road behind Ospringe Court, SE9 2LD need supporting as bent over, Trees have recently been pruned but no support provided.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Perpins Road, Avery Hill
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins have not been collected on estate in two weeks, 1st April
item.description:
The bins on the estate have not been collected for two weeks, reported to Hackney council on multiple occasions with no response. The smell is vial, waste is strewn all over floor, rats have been seen
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox on side of road, 1st April
item.description:
There is a dead fox on the side of the road, opposite the entrance to Nuffield health and fitness gym.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sidcup By-pass, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Dead animal in the carriageway or footway

item.title: Lots of rubbish has been dumped, 1st April
item.description:
A gap in the vegetation has become a public dustbin. There are bags of rubbish, bedding and general litter. I note that the bags featured in a report from a month ago that was reported as fixed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 30 cm pothole, 1st April
item.description:
This pothole is in Clock House Road, on the junction with Cedars Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clock House Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
